abilities.description: When you focus on a source of light and capture its essence, roll *wits. On a strong hit, take +6 light. On a weak hit, take +3. Then, when you make a move by using your light, suffer -1 light and take +1 momentum on a hit. If you make this move to overcome or navigate darkness, also add +2.

You may use your light to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} against a dark-dwelling foe. Choose the amount of light to unleash, and roll +light instead of +iron or +edge. Then, suffer -light equal to that amount. On a hit, mark progress.
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} by using your light, add +1 and suffer -1 light.
